chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-489 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For hearing of MA No.2589/2018. For hearing of main case. 11.02.2025 Mr. Rafique Ahmed Dahri Assistant A.G. Sindh. None present for the petitioner. There is no intimation. This petition is pending since 2018 and it was lastly fixed on 23.12.2020 where none was present except learned Additional A.G. Sindh. Under the circumstances, it reflects that petitioner is not interested to proceed further. Accordingly, instant petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
